name: desktop-taste
description: Desktop UI/UX taste skills for coding Agents building macOS and Windows applications.

interface.shortDescription: Improve macOS and Windows app UI
interface.longDescription: Desktop Taste helps coding Agents design, implement, critique, and document macOS and Windows desktop application UI with better layout, typography, spacing, density, motion, native feel, and product-specific expression.
defaultPrompt: Review this desktop app UI for taste issues
Improve this macOS or Windows app screen
Create a desktop DESIGN.md for this project
